data.value: Dominated CS2 in 2026, winning IEM Krakow and PGL Cluj-Napoca, with ZywOo taking MVP honors. Nine Tier 1 event wins in 2025 and continuing in 2026. Rated the most stable team in any bracket.
donk carries a 1.32 rating — among the highest in the world. Spirit considered one of the most dangerous teams in any bracket and favorites for IEM Cologne and Singapore.
The historic return of s1mple with a 1.24 rating is the biggest CS2 storyline of 2026. NAVI's legacy and s1mple's hunger for redemption make them compelling value at +300 for IEM Cologne.
Notably absent from the BLAST Open Rotterdam field despite being one of the world's top teams. Missed the $1.6M invitation cut-off, significantly changing the event's power dynamic.
Top-ranked globally but a trophy remains an unfulfilled dream. Amazing potential but analysts say they have not yet cleared the final hurdle against Vitality or FURIA in high-stakes maps.
Holds #2 HLTV ranking, reached IEM Krakow grand final, and represents the clearest challenger to Vitality's dominance with a deep, athletically aggressive style.
Expert models predict Liquid will miss the Cologne Major with only a 27.4% qualification chance. A major disappointment for the North American organization early in 2026.
